title: litsea umbellata
intro: Litsea umbellata, also known as the May Chang or Mountain Pepper, is a species of evergreen tree native to southern China and northern Thailand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Litsea umbellata include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Litsea umbellata is often used in essential oil form, which can be used in aromatherapy, perfumery, and as a natural insect repellent.
